title: Brandads 16 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Arc'teryx × Lewis Hamilton — "ALPHA FORCE" FORMAT: Ultra-Premium Outdoor SMM Poster | 4:5 | Instagram Hero | Behance Front Page Quality CORE STRATEGY: High-performance mountain technical. GORE-TEX fabric weaves, bright colors, and topographical lines.CAMPAIGN: "ALPHA FORCE"MASTER VISUAL: Bold ARC'TERYX bird logo and wordmark (70% canvas) in electric lime green. HERO SUBJECT: Lewis Hamilton. Neon lime green Arc'teryx waterproof shell jacket, technical hood up.POSE: Facing forward, chin up, look of determination, standing in wind and rain. COLOR SYSTEM: Electric Lime, Obsidian Black, Alpine Mist White, Slate Grey.BACKGROUND: Wind-swept mountain summit covered in dark grey rocks and white mist. GRAPHIC SYSTEM: Vector topographic contour lines, technical fabric waterproof specs, utility grid marks. PROMOTIONAL ELEMENTS: ALPHA SV JACKET | CLIMBING AND MOUNTAIN | ONLINE LAUNCHTYPOGRAPHY: Top left wordmark | Center giant A R C ' T E R Y X | Title: ALPHA FORCELIGHTING: Cold morning daylight with a strong white rim light highlighting the hood and shoulders. wardrobe: transparent layered outerwear with soft volume. color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. CAMERA: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 50mm Lens, sharp focus on fabric weave and rain droplets on the coat. adult subject: adult high-fashion model. setting: pale seamless editorial studio. editorial mood: minimal high-fashion campaign mood.
